principles.name: Light one next step
principles.why: The target user arrives with scattered ambiguous inputs
principles.visible_consequence: Activation asks for one signal, not a dashboard tour

principles.name: Reasons in the margin
principles.why: Trust comes from seeing why Forge picked a next action
principles.visible_consequence: Evidence notes attach beside the commitment rail

principles.name: Commitment changes shape
principles.why: The core loop is not browsing; it is choosing and returning
principles.visible_consequence: The rail mutates after each commitment and reveals the next state

principles.name: Boundaries are honest
principles.why: Monetization and missing evidence must not surprise the user
principles.visible_consequence: Locked branches and error states explain what is unavailable and why

colors.product_rationale: soft uncertainty without blank white admin feel
steady contrast for decisive next step

typography.product_rationale: warm enough for personal planning, strong enough for commitment

spacing_and_shape.product_rationale: makes reasons visibly subordinate but available

components.name: CommitmentRail
components.purpose: Carries the visible sequence of decisions
usage_rules: Use only where this trail behavior is product-relevant
Keep the commitment rail visible when context changes

components.name: EvidenceMargin
components.purpose: Shows why a step is trustworthy
usage_rules: Use only where this trail behavior is product-relevant
Keep the commitment rail visible when context changes

usage_rules: Use only where this trail behavior is product-relevant

usage_rules: Use only where this trail behavior is product-relevant

usage_rules: Use only where this trail behavior is product-relevant
Keep the commitment rail visible when context changes

components.name: ReturnMarker
usage_rules: Use only where this trail behavior is product-relevant
Keep the commitment rail visible when context changes

screen_composition_rules: Activation screen is a fog prompt feeding a left-edge rail, never a stats dashboard
Core loop keeps commitment rail persistent while evidence margin changes
Empty state uses open trail space plus one signal request, not a generic illustration card
empty_error_loading_rules: Empty: Ask for one signal to start clearing the trail
Error: Name the missing evidence and offer one repair action
Loading: Shimmer along the rail only, preserving spatial continuity
accessibility_rules: Contrast meets WCAG AA for rail and margin notes
Dynamic Type up to AX3 preserves the rail before wrapping notes
Reduce motion changes trail reveal into instant state swap
VoiceOver labels include step number, commitment state, and evidence count
banned_patterns: DSCard stack as first useful screen
